S.FORM: Letsie III I 1963 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Letsie III, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Lesotho anini i ci Letsie III, patirengan a romi'ad i 1996 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: …ĺ…ôtsi…ô iii i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …ĺ…ôtsi…ô iii, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ĺ…ôso~utńßo~u anini i ¶i …ĺ…ôtsi…ô iii, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Letsie III I 1963 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Letsie III, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Lesotho anini i ci Letsie III, patirengan a romi'ad i 1996 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
